name: estimated-resident-population-at-30-june-2018-by-territorial-authority-and-auckland-local-board
title: Estimated Resident Population at 30 June 2018 by Territorial Authority and Auckland Local Boards
description: Estimated resident population for census-base years, with age, sex and broad ethnic-group measures for territorial authorities and Auckland local board areas. Geography uses 2020 boundaries.
